findings.one_line: The determinant-ratio theorem is conditional on choosing C in Mcal_m, where Mcal_m is defined by the same row-uniform transfer the theorem exploits, so this node reads as a packaging kernel rather than a field-level theorem against the cited literature.

The strongest unconditional positive result is a covariance-order source-isolated subclass theorem that lands in the known IV/half-trek comparator class, and the note does not yet make the theorem-level case that this subclass opening clears the injected field novelty floor.
